subject: wild root salon on mobile
body:
Hi there,

I was looking at salons in downtown Franklin and came across Wild Root -- 15 years in business with a great reputation is no small thing.

But right now if someone searches for hair salon near Franklin, you're invisible. Your only presence is a Facebook page, and that doesn't show up in Google the way a real website does.

I can mock up what your site could look like on a phone -- clean, modern, easy to book from. Takes me 10 minutes and it's yours to keep.

Want me to send it over?

Eric Lefler
OphidianAI
